title: Lettres d'amour
actors: Odette Joyeux, François Périer, Julien Carette
plot: France, 1855. Zélie Fontaine, a twenty-odd-year-old widow and the post mistress of the small provincial town of Argenson, has accepted to receive love letters to Hortense de la Jacquerie, the prefect's wife, under her name. But Ho...
